catalog_scope: direct sleeve JSON entries under sleeves/archive, sleeves/generated, and selected top-level sleeve source artifacts; broader sleeves/library and extracted block-library surfaces remain derived/provisional and are not treated as exhaustive direct sleeve catalog entries here
notes: This catalog is authoritative for directly cataloged sleeve JSON source entries, not for every derived sleeve/library artifact.
Broader sleeve/library documentation surfaces and extracted structured stores contain additional sleeve-derived material and should be treated as derived/provisional until later reconciliation.
See docs/TRUTH-STATE.md and docs/BROWSE-COVERAGE.md for current doctrine.
